title: Grade ones welcomed at Union Preparatory School
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS AND VIDEO - There was...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS AND VIDEO - There was great excitement in the air and no one expected a welcome shower of rain while the grade ones arrived at Union Preparatory School for the first time this morning just after 7:00.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS AND VIDEO - There was great excitement in the air and no one expected a welcome shower of rain while the grade ones arrived at Union Preparatory School for the first time this morning just after 7:00."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"A special guard of honour was held by the other learners to welcome all the newbies to the school."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Many grade one’s couldn't wait for their parents to leave and others didn’t want them to go.","html":"Many grade one’s couldn't wait for their parents to leave and others didn’t want them to go."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"VIDEO: Ben Snyman","html":"VIDEO: Ben Snyman"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Grade ones welcomed at Union Preparatory School
